title: Turquoise3D Extra
description: New models and changes to existing ones!
body:
Add-on for Turquoise3D, changing mushrooms & sugar cane, and adding 3D tools!

Mushrooms and Sugar Cane receive shading & Ambient Occlusion, and mushrooms get 3D stems!
3D Tools are added (which got redesigns some time ago, do you remember those?), using ONLY vanilla textures!
The stick gets a 3D model, and still uses a vanilla texture!
